"[15] [Appended, 00:59:49] [3] OTHER VEHS ON RHS - ABOUT 50 YARDS AHEAD OF THE 1125V"
"[14] [Appended, 00:59:49] [2] 5 VEHS INVD- 1 VEH IS BLKING #3 LN , POSS A PK TRK "
"[2] UNK VEH AT HIGH SPEEDS TC'D INTO REAR OF ANOTHER VEH"
"[1] VEH VS POST - BLK FORD F150 W/WHI CAMPER - DROVE OFF THE RDWY - HIT A POST - NOW IN THE PLANTS AND DIRT"
